title: zehneria repanda
intro: Zehneria repanda, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zehneria repanda include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting cognitive function, among others. Zehneria repanda is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
